prompt: Paired board, fair continue price, and only one street left to navigate: choose action.
why_v1: Paired boards usually stay calmer, and a fair price with limited future-street risk supports continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This calmer board and fair price support a continue.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. A paired board and fair price keep this spot stable enough to continue instead of releasing too early.
